subcodes.first_line: O blessed souls! Your felicitations upon arrival were received, and the heartfelt sentiments of the divine friends brought the utmost joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفوس مبارکه تهنیت ورود رسید و نهایت سرور از احساسات وجدانیه یاران الهی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @Manifestation of God as sun
